nasb.text: I will also lay the dead bodies of the sons of Israel in front of their idols; and I will scatter your bones around your altars.

esv.text: And I will lay the dead bodies of the people of Israel before their idols, and I will scatter your bones around your altars.

cnv.text: 我要把以色列人的屍體放在他們的偶像面前，又把你們的骸骨拋散在你們祭壇的周圍。

ccb.text: 使他们横尸在你们的偶像面前，骸骨散在祭坛的四周。
